hero.title: Delegate UMA, stay hands-off.
hero.subtitle: UMAVote.com helps you manage staking and voting in one place -- all you need to do is hold UMA-V.

stats.assetsSub: Total net assets in the pool

yieldCard.yieldBody: The returns of the delegation pool mainly come from two sources: staking rewards from UMA and rewards or slashing resulting from voting behavior. Therefore, the NAV of UMA-V is influenced by both staking and voting performance.
yieldCard.feeBodyBeforeNominal: Fees apply only to staking yield at
yieldCard.feeBodyBetweenNominalAndActual: ; no fee on principal; no separate fee on voting rewards or penalties. Effective fee rate is below
yieldCard.feeSecondary: Fees are settled in UMA and handled by the protocol.

position.title: My Position
position.empty: Connect your wallet to view your position and start delegating UMA.
position.helper: UMA-V represents your share in the pool. Its UMA value changes with pool NAV.

claimBanner.title: Your UMA is ready to claim.

stake.title: Stake UMA
stake.estimatedDisclaimer: Figures are for reference only; actual amounts depend on on-chain execution.
stake.flowHint: First click Approve UMA to grant allowance to the vault contract, then click Stake UMA to delegate.

redeem.title: Request Redeem
redeem.hint: Redeem is asynchronous. If new UMA enters the pool or rewards are harvested, your redeem may complete earlier than the full cooldown(7 days).
redeem.restrict: Only one active redeem request is allowed per wallet at a time.
redeem.blocked: You already have an active redeem. Complete or claim it first.

progress.title: Redeem Progress
progress.candidateHint: This request is in the vault candidate queue; when promoted it will appear in redeem progress above.

transparency.onchainBody: All stake, redeem, reward, and claim actions are on-chain.
transparency.feeBody: Fees only apply to staking yield. No fee on principal; no separate fee on voting rewards or slashing.
transparency.riskBody: Holding UMA-V means sharing pool performance and slash risk. Once redeem is requested and shares are burned, later reward/slash changes no longer apply to that request.

errors.ACTIVE_REDEEM_EXISTS: An active redemption is already in progress.
errors.THIRDWEB_CLIENT_ID: Set VITE_THIRDWEB_CLIENT_ID in your environment (Client ID from the thirdweb Dashboard).
errors.THIRDWEB_BRIDGE: Wallet connection UI is not ready yet. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.WRONG_NETWORK: Switch your wallet to the network used by this app (see chain settings).
errors.INVALID_AMOUNT: Enter a valid UMA amount greater than zero.
errors.STAKE_OUT_OF_RANGE: Stake amount must be between {min} and {max} UMA (inclusive).
errors.STAKE_EXCEEDS_BALANCE: Amount exceeds your wallet UMA balance ({balance} UMA).
errors.STAKE_LIMITS_UNAVAILABLE: Could not load stake limits from config. Try again later.
errors.REDEEM_OUT_OF_RANGE: Redeem amount must be between {min} and {max} UMA-V (inclusive).
errors.REDEEM_EXCEEDS_BALANCE: Amount exceeds your available UMA-V ({balance} UMA-V).
errors.REDEEM_INVALID_AMOUNT: Enter a valid redeem amount greater than zero.
errors.REDEEM_LIMITS_UNAVAILABLE: Could not load redeem limits. Try again later.
errors.NOT_CLAIMABLE: This redemption is not claimable yet. Wait for on-chain state to update.

steps.waiting_liquidity_eta_tooltip: If enough new liquidity is added during this window to cover the redemption, your request can become ready to unstake immediately.
